memberdef.name: kCreateTablesSql
memberdef.initializer: = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS iceberg_tables (" "catalog_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, " "table_namespace VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, " "table_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, " "metadata_location VARCHAR(1000), " "previous_metadata_location VARCHAR(1000), " "iceberg_type VARCHAR(5), " "PRIMARY KEY (catalog_name, table_namespace, table_name))"

memberdef.name: kAddRecordTypeSql
memberdef.initializer: = "ALTER TABLE iceberg_tables ADD COLUMN iceberg_type VARCHAR(5)"

memberdef.name: kCreateNamespacePropertiesSql
memberdef.initializer: = "CREATE TABLE IF NOT EXISTS iceberg_namespace_properties (" "catalog_name VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, " "namespace VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, " "property_key VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, " "property_value VARCHAR(1000), " "PRIMARY KEY (catalog_name, namespace, property_key))"

briefdescription.para: Create the backing tables if they do not already exist.

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if the tables are ready.

memberdef.definition: Result< std::vector< std::string > > iceberg::sql::Sqlpp23CatalogStore< ConnectionSource, Traits >::ListNamespaceNames
memberdef.name: ListNamespaceNames

briefdescription.para: Return the distinct namespace identifiers known to this catalog.

simplesect.para: A list of namespace identifiers in the store's string form.

memberdef.definition: Result< std::vector< NamespaceProperty > > iceberg::sql::Sqlpp23CatalogStore< ConnectionSource, Traits >::GetNamespaceProperties
memberdef.name: GetNamespaceProperties

briefdescription.para: Return all property rows stored for ns.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.

simplesect.para: The property rows stored for the namespace.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view ns, std::string_view key, std::optional< std::string_view > value) override
memberdef.name: InsertNamespaceProperty

briefdescription.para: Insert one property row for ns.

detaileddescription.para: A primary-key collision (same namespace + key) must be reported as ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Property key.
Property value, or std::nullopt for SQL NULL.

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if the row was inserted.

briefdescription.para: Delete the property row identified by (ns, key), if present.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Property key.

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if the row was deleted or did not exist.

briefdescription.para: Delete all property rows for ns.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.

memberdef.definition: Result< std::vector< std::string > > iceberg::sql::Sqlpp23CatalogStore< ConnectionSource, Traits >::ListTableNames
memberdef.name: ListTableNames

briefdescription.para: Return the table names stored directly under ns.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.

briefdescription.para: Whether a row exists for the table (ns, name).

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Table name.

simplesect.para: true if the table row exists, false otherwise.

memberdef.definition: Result< std::optional< std::string > > iceberg::sql::Sqlpp23CatalogStore< ConnectionSource, Traits >::GetTableMetadataLocation
memberdef.name: GetTableMetadataLocation

briefdescription.para: Return the current metadata location of (ns, name).

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Table name.

simplesect.para: The metadata location, or std::nullopt if the table has no row or its metadata_location column is NULL.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view ns, std::string_view name, std::string_view metadata_location) override
memberdef.name: InsertTable

briefdescription.para: Insert a new table row with the given metadata location.

detaileddescription.para: The previous_metadata_location column is set to NULL. A primary-key collision must be reported as ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Table name.
Table metadata location.

simplesect.para: Status indicating success if the row was inserted.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view ns, std::string_view name, std::string_view new_location, std::string_view new_previous_location, std::string_view expected_current_location) override
memberdef.name: UpdateTableMetadataLocation

briefdescription.para: Conditionally update a table's metadata location (optimistic CAS).

detaileddescription.para: The update only applies when the stored metadata_location still equals expected_current_location.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Table name.
New table metadata location.
New previous metadata location.
Expected current metadata location.

simplesect.para: The number of rows updated (1 on success, 0 on a stale base).

briefdescription.para: Delete the table row (ns, name), if present.

parameterdescription.para: A namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Table name.

memberdef.argsstring: (std::string_view from_ns, std::string_view from_name, std::string_view to_ns, std::string_view to_name) override
memberdef.name: RenameTable

briefdescription.para: Move a table row to a new namespace and/or name.

detaileddescription.para: A primary-key collision with an existing target must be reported as ErrorKind::kAlreadyExists.

parameterdescription.para: Source namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Source table name.
Target namespace identifier in the store's string form.
Target table name.

simplesect.para: The number of rows updated (1 on success, 0 if the source is gone).

briefdescription.para: Execute body atomically inside a single transaction.

detaileddescription.para: The implementation begins a transaction, invokes body (which issues store operations on this same instance), then commits if body returns success or rolls back otherwise. Implementations are not required to support nesting.

parameterdescription.para: Transaction body to execute.

simplesect.para: Status returned by body, or a transaction error.

briefdescription.para: Run fn, translating any thrown exception into a Status.
CatalogStore backed by a concrete sqlpp23 connection source.

parameterdescription.para: A single connection or pooled connection source.
A policy type providing static bool IsUniqueViolation(const std::exception&) and optionally static bool IsDuplicateColumn(const std::exception&).
